nasb.text: While they still could not believe it because of their joy and amazement, He said to them, “Have you anything here to eat?”

esv.text: And while they still disbelieved for joy and were marveling, he said to them, “Have you anything here to eat?”

cnv.text: 他們歡喜到不敢相信，並且很驚奇。耶穌說：“你們這裡有甚麼吃的沒有？”

ccb.text: 门徒又惊又喜，半信半疑。耶稣问：“你们这里有吃的吗？”

csbs.text: 他们又惊又喜，还不敢相信的时候，耶稣对他们说：“你们这里有什么吃的吗？”
